question: The line chart shows adjusted revenue from 2018 to 2022. Which of the following statements is correct based on the data?

options.A: Adjusted revenue in 2022 is higher than in 2021.
options.B: Adjusted revenue in 2021 and 2022 is the same.
options.C: Adjusted revenue peaked in 2019 and then declined every year.
options.D: Adjusted revenue decreased continuously from 2018 to 2020 and then stayed flat.

explanation: The y-scale is set so that the largest values are cut off, creating a misleading impression that the top final year are equal.
